scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "BROWSER=chrome npm run dev --prefix client -- --open"
scripts.dev_dia: concurrently --kill-others --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "BROWSER=DIA npm run dev --prefix client -- --open"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
